_comment: Papers are fetched from arXiv or CVF Open Access only. 'sha256' and 'status' are filled in by scripts/download_papers.py, which also verifies each file begins with the %PDF magic bytes. NOTE: local_path values point into the curated papers/ taxonomy; the expanded literature record is metadata/papers.json.

papers.title: Grounding DINO: Marrying DINO with Grounded Pre-Training for Open-Set Object Detection
